title: Illusion
why_this_song: Illusion by Dua Lipa (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I been known to miss a red flag
Now I'm grown, I know what I deserve
Yeah, I just wanna dance with the illusion

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: In the end, those things just don't last
Dance all night, dance all night
Yeah, I just wanna dance with

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Dua Lipa one question about "Illusion", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Dua Lipa sobre "Illusion", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Illusion" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Illusion" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Illusion" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Illusion" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Illusion" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Illusion" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
